name: Energisme S.A.
summary: Energisme SAS provides an intelligent platform to help organizations in automating the real-time control of energy performance. The company offers a digital service hub in SaaS mode for energy and environmental performance, which allows in detecting ways of optimizing energy consumption and bills, as well as to develop an economic value for various actors in the ecosystem. It provides energy data cloud computing services to blue chip companies and public players. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
